story.iWant: a screen to enter prompts and see generated images
story.soThat: I can create images from text
story.tasks: - Task 1: Create ImageGenerationScreen composable - Task 2: Integrate progress display from Story 7.3 - Task 3: Display final generated image - Task 4: Model availability check and error handling - Task 5: Navigation integration - Task 6: Integration testing and validation

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Given I tap the Image Generation tile on home screen, when the screen loads, then I see a prompt input field and Generate button
Given I am on the image generation screen, when I enter a prompt (multi-line, max 500 chars), then I can adjust iterations via slider (5-50, default 20)
Given I have entered a prompt and tap Generate, when generation starts, then I see the progress display from Story 7.3 (step count, intermediate previews, cancel button, privacy indicator)
Given generation completes successfully, when the final image is ready, then it displays at 512x512 resolution with "Generate Again" button
Given I tap "Generate Again", when regeneration starts, then a new seed is used (produces different result from same prompt)
Given I am a first-time user without the model downloaded, when I open the screen, then I see: "Generate images from text, completely offline. Download the 1.9GB model to get started."

artifact.title: Epic 7: AI Image Generation
artifact.snippet: As a user, I want a screen to enter prompts and see generated images. Screen includes: prompt field (multi-line, 500 chars), iteration slider (5-50, default 20), Generate button, progress display, final image with Generate Again option.

artifact.title: OnDevice AI Architecture
artifact.snippet: Task screens follow pattern: Scaffold with TopAppBar, Column layout for input/output, ViewModel for state management, Hilt injection. Reference LlmChatScreen for task screen structure.

artifact.title: Product Requirements Document
artifact.snippet: Generate images from text prompts entirely on-device using Stable Diffusion. User enters prompt, adjusts iterations (quality vs speed tradeoff), sees progress during generation, views 512x512 result.

artifact.title: Product Requirements Document
artifact.section: FR53: Regenerate with same prompt (new seed)
artifact.snippet: "Generate Again" button allows users to regenerate image with same prompt but different random seed, producing varied results from identical text input.

artifact.reason: Created in Story 7.3 - provides state management for generation. Screen will use this ViewModel to start generation, observe progress, handle cancellation. Already implements all necessary functionality.

Created in Story 7.3 - ready-to-use progress UI component. Story 7.4 screen will show this composable when uiState.isGenerating=true. Includes privacy indicator, progress text, intermediate previews, cancel button.
UI state model from Story 7.3. Screen observes: isGenerating, currentStep, totalSteps, intermediateBitmap, finalBitmap, errorMessage, cancelled fields.
Reference pattern for task screens - shows Scaffold with TopAppBar, Column layout, TextField for input, Button for submission, result display. ImageGenerationScreen should follow similar structure.
MainScreen composable currently shows ImageGenerationPlaceholderScreen. Story 7.4 will replace this with full ImageGenerationScreen implementation.
Stable Diffusion model definition. Screen needs to check if model is downloaded, get model path via model.getPath(context), pass to viewModel.startGeneration().

constraints.constraint: Prompt input: Multi-line OutlinedTextField with maxLines=5, character limit 500 with counter display
Iteration slider: Slider component with valueRange=5f..50f, steps=44, default value=20
Display current iteration value: "Iterations: X" label above slider
Generate button: Disabled when prompt is blank or model not downloaded
Progress display: Reuse ImageGenerationProgressDisplay from Story 7.3 - show when isGenerating=true
Final image display: Card with Image composable, aspectRatio(1f) for 512x512, show when finalBitmap != null
Generate Again button: Generates new random seed using kotlin.random.Random.nextInt(), calls clearResult() then startGeneration()
Model path: Get from model.getPath(context), pass to viewModel.startGeneration(context, modelPath, prompt, iterations, seed)
State management: Collect viewModel.uiState.collectAsState(), observe isGenerating, finalBitmap, errorMessage
Navigation: Follow task screen pattern - Scaffold with TopAppBar, back button calls navigateUp()
Model availability: Check modelManagerViewModel to determine if Stable Diffusion model is downloaded
First-time user message: Show if model not available - prompt to download 1.9GB model from Model Manager

interface.name: ImageGenerationScreen
interface.signature: @Composable fun ImageGenerationScreen(modelManagerViewModel: ModelManagerViewModel, navigateUp: () -> Unit, imageGenerationViewModel: ImageGenerationViewModel = viewModel())
interface.note: Main screen composable for image generation. Replaces ImageGenerationPlaceholderScreen in ImageGenerationTaskModule.MainScreen().

interface.name: ImageGenerationViewModel.startGeneration
interface.signature: fun startGeneration(context: Context, modelPath: String, prompt: String, iterations: Int, seed: Int)
interface.note: Implemented in Story 7.3. Screen calls this when Generate button is tapped. Seed is random int generated in screen.

interface.name: ImageGenerationViewModel.cancelGeneration
interface.note: Implemented in Story 7.3. Called by ImageGenerationProgressDisplay cancel button.

interface.name: ImageGenerationViewModel.clearResult
interface.note: Implemented in Story 7.3. Called before "Generate Again" to clear previous bitmap.

interface.name: ImageGenerationProgressDisplay
interface.signature: @Composable fun ImageGenerationProgressDisplay(currentStep: Int, totalSteps: Int, intermediateBitmap: Bitmap?, onCancel: () -> Unit)
interface.note: Implemented in Story 7.3. Screen shows this when uiState.isGenerating=true. Pass uiState fields directly.

interface.name: Model.getPath
interface.note: Returns absolute path to model directory (e.g., externalFilesDir/Stable_diffusion/_/sd15/). Pass to viewModel.startGeneration().

tests.standards: Follow existing Compose UI testing patterns. Use createComposeRule() for Compose tests. Test user interactions (input, button clicks, slider changes). Verify ViewModel state updates. Mock ViewModel for isolated UI tests. Integration tests require actual model download (1.9GB). Test navigation flow from task tile to screen. Verify error states and model availability checks.

ideas.test-idea: Navigate to screen - assert prompt TextField and Generate button are visible and enabled/disabled correctly.
Enter prompt text - assert character counter updates. Adjust slider - assert iteration value label updates.
Tap Generate with valid input - assert ViewModel.startGeneration() called, ImageGenerationProgressDisplay becomes visible.
Mock ViewModel with finalBitmap - assert Image composable displays bitmap, "Generate Again" button visible.
Tap "Generate Again" - assert clearResult() called, new seed generated, startGeneration() called again.
Mock model as not downloaded - assert first-time user message displayed with model download prompt.
